# opnsense_system_tunable (Data Source)

Reads an existing system tunable on OPNsense by UUID.

Tunables can affect kernel, network, firewall, storage, or service behavior. Some tunables may require a reboot or subsystem reload before every runtime effect is visible.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_system_tunable" "msgbuf_timestamp" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description stored with the tunable.
- `tunable` (String) System tunable name.
- `value` (String) Configured tunable value.
